title: EnvelopesInformation
description: Contains information about the envelopes returned by a list request, including the result set and pagination details.

envelopes.description: The list of envelopes matching the query.

resultSetSize.description: The number of results in the current set.

totalSetSize.description: The total number of envelopes matching the query.

startPosition.description: The starting index position of the current result set.

endPosition.description: The ending index position of the current result set.

nextUri.description: URI for the next page of results.

previousUri.description: URI for the previous page of results.
